title: N2 Knysna Lagoon to be cleared at 13:00
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEOS - Following the truck...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEOS - Following the truck that left the N2 (Knysna Lagoon) into the lagoon this morning, the owner of the two tow trucks on the scene advised that the recovery process may take up to 5 hours as the truck weighs about 25 ton.


> Meanwhile staff members of SANPark and SpillTech distributed absorbant fibre and booms in the water to remove the diesel spilage in the lagoon.


The traffic department will also stay on the scene to regulate the traffic.

Read more about this article in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.

VIDEOS: Supplied

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Previous article: Truck overturns on N2, lands in Knysna Lagoon | George Herald

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
